creator: yamagi@yamagi.org
text:
Created attachment 146250
Patch to fix and update the port

As mentioned in bug 192705 sysutils/zfsnap is currently unfetchable and was therefor marked as BROKEN. The problems were apparently caused by moving the Github project into a new account https://github.com/zfsnap. The attached patch fixes that breakage and uppdates the port to the last version 1.11.1. The only difference to the old version 1.11.0 is a fixed typo.
